caption: A handheld camera moves through a residential interior, starting in a narrow hallway and transitioning into a living area. The hallway features pale yellow walls, a dark brown wooden wardrobe, and a grey rectangular piece of furniture. A white electrical outlet is visible on the wall with a cable plugged into it. As the camera pans and moves forward, it reveals a bright living room with white tiled floors. In the background, a brown leather sofa sits on a red patterned area rug, positioned in front of a large window with cream-colored curtains. A television on a dark stand is partially visible on the right. The camera continues to move, shifting its angle to provide a wider view of the open-plan space, passing by the dark wooden wardrobe doors that act as a partition between the hallway and the main living area. No people are present in the scene.
